news.title: 油价炸了！全球市场恐慌
邦迪海滩枪击案嫌犯申请禁制令保护家人身份
news.title0: Alleged Bondi gunman seeks order to suppress family's identity
news.content: 邦迪海滩枪击案嫌犯纳维德·阿克拉姆向法院申请禁制令，要求媒体不得公布其直系亲属的详细信息，理由是担心他们的安全。
news.content0: Alleged Bondi Beach gunman Naveed Akram has sought a court order to prevent media from publishing details of his immediate family over concerns about their safety.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 蕾哈娜比弗利山庄豪宅遭枪击
news.title0: Rihanna's Beverly Hills home hit by gunfire, police say
news.content: 警方称，流行巨星蕾哈娜位于比弗利山庄的豪宅遭枪击，一名女性嫌疑人被捕，事件中无人受伤。
news.content0: The Beverly Hills home of pop superstar Rihanna has been hit by gunfire, police say.
news.author: BBC

news.title: G7将召开紧急会议讨论油价飙升
news.title0: G7 nations to hold emergency meeting on oil as stock markets sink
news.content: 因美以与伊朗战争升级导致油价突破每桶100美元，七国集团财长将召开紧急会议讨论经济影响。
news.content0: G7 nations will hold an emergency meeting on Monday to discuss surging oil prices as crudejumped above $100 a barrel and stock markets slumped over the escalating US-Israeli war with Iran.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 可可价格暴跌，西非农民陷入困境
news.title0: Bitter times for cocoa farmers as chocolate market slumps
news.content: 全球巧克力价格飙升，但西非可可豆农却数月未获付款，加纳和科特迪瓦的行业陷入混乱。
news.content0: The price of chocolate bars has shot up across the world over the past year, meaning they can feel like a luxury - yet West Africa's cocoa farmers have not been reaping the benefit. In fact, many are in a desperate state as they have not been paid for months.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 伊朗女足亚洲杯出局，安全引担忧
news.title0: Australia urged to protect Iranian football team after Asian Cup elimination
news.content: 伊朗女足在澳大利亚亚洲杯出局后，各方呼吁确保其安全回国，部分球员赛前拒唱国歌引发国内批评。
news.content0: Football's governing bodies and Australian authorities are being urged to ensure the safety of Iran's women's team as they prepare to fly home from Australia after being eliminated from the Asian Cup.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 威尔士水库发现无名男尸，警方发布面部复原图
news.title0: Images of face released in bid to solve mystery of man found dead in wetsuit
news.content: 威尔士中部偏远水库发现一具仅着潜水服的男尸，警方发布数字面部复原图，希望解开其身份之谜。
news.content0: Detectives hope a new digital recreation of a man's face could help them work out who he was - 18 months on from his highly decomposed body being found in a remote mid Wales reservoir.
news.author: BBC

news.title: IRA爆炸案受害者起诉前新芬党领袖亚当斯
news.title0: IRA bomb victims' civil court case begins against Gerry Adams
news.content: 三名爱尔兰共和军爆炸案受害者对前新芬党领袖格里·亚当斯提起民事诉讼，指控其应对1973年和1996年的爆炸案负责。
news.content0: A civil court case brought by three IRA bomb victims against former Sinn Féin leader Gerry Adams opens in London on Monday.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国中部遭龙卷风袭击致8人死亡
news.title0: Severe storms that spawned destructive tornadoes leave 8 dead across the Central US
news.content: 美国中部地区遭遇严重风暴和破坏性龙卷风袭击，建筑物被毁，已造成至少8人死亡。
news.content0: Severe storms brought damaging tornadoes to parts of the central US Thursday and Friday, shredding buildings into piles of debris and killing at least eight people.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 五角大楼将AI公司列为供应链风险
news.title0: Anthropic says the Pentagon’s supply chain risk label will have less business impact than feared
news.content: 美国国防部将人工智能公司Anthropic列为“供应链风险”，但该公司称其对商业伙伴的影响小于预期。
news.content0: Anthropic on Thursday said a Pentagon designation of the AI company as a “supply chain risk to America’s national security” won’t impact their business partners as heavily as Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth implied last week.
news.author: CNN
